entries.source: Maintain two layers: an in-character voice bounded by the selected time and worldview, and a historian sidecar that flags documented fact, plausible reconstruction, contested interpretation, modern paraphrase, anachronism, and uncertainty. Let the person resist, challenge, evade, ask questions back, or reject false premises when historically fitting.
entries.value: Panatilihin dalawa layers: isang in-character voice bounded ng ang selected oras at worldview, at isang historian sidecar na flags dokumentado katotohanan, posibleng rekonstruksyon, contested interpretation, makabagong paraphrase, anachronism, at kawalan ng katiyakan. Let ang tao resist, challenge, evade, Magtanong likod, o reject false premises kapag historically fitting.

entries.source: Never present generated dialogue as authenticated quotation. Do not sanitize harmful views or glorify oppression, casteism, racism, slavery, misogyny, authoritarianism, or violence. Context should clarify without excusing. Do not give medical, legal, financial, or harmful advice through the persona. Preserve the difference between learning from a historical person and endorsing them.
entries.value: Never present generated dialogue bilang pinatunayang sipi. Gawin hindi sanitize harmful views o glorify oppression, casteism, racism, slavery, misogyny, authoritarianism, o violence. Konteksto dapat clarify nang walang excusing. Gawin hindi Bigyan mo ako ngdical, legal, financial, o harmful advice sa pamamagitan ng ang persona. Preserve ang difference sa pagitan ng pag-aaral mula sa isang pangkasaysayan tao at endorsing sila.

entries.source: Never reveal future answers. Avoid trick questions unless the topic calls for advanced challenge.
entries.value: Never reveal future mga sagot. Avoid trick mga tanong maliban kung ang paksa calls para sa advanced challenge.

entries.source: No waiver by Company of any term or condition set forth in Terms shall be deemed a further or continuing waiver of such term or condition or a waiver of any other term or condition, and any failure of Company to assert a right or provision under Terms shall not constitute a waiver of such right or provision. If any provision of Terms is held by a court or other tribunal of competent jurisdiction to be invalid, illegal or unenforceable for any reason, such provision shall be eliminated or limited to the minimum extent such that the remaining provisions of Terms will continue in full force and effect.
entries.value: No waiver ng Kompanya ng anumang term o condition set forth sa Terms shall maging deemed isang further o continuing waiver ng such term o condition o isang waiver ng anumang other term o condition, at anumang failure ng Kompanya sa igiit isang tama o provision sa ilalim ng Terms shall hindi constitute isang waiver ng such tama o provision. Kung anumang provision ng Terms ay held ng isang court o other tribunal ng competent jurisdiction sa maging invalid, illegal o unenforceable para sa anumang dahilan, such provision shall maging eliminated o limited sa ang minimum extent such na ang remaining provisions ng Terms magiging continue sa full force at effect.

entries.source: No. Private saved chats use private identifiers, are not listed in the sitemap, and are not included in AI discovery files such as llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or ai-content-index.json.
entries.value: Hindi. Mga pribadong naka-save na chat Gamitin pribado identifiers, ay hindi listed sa ang sitemap, at ay hindi kasama sa Pagtuklas gamit ang AI files such bilang llms.txt, llms-full.txt, o ai-content-index.json.

entries.source: No. Public pages are indexable, but private saved chats are not included in the sitemap, llms files, or AI content index.
entries.value: Hindi. Mga pampublikong pahina ay indexable, pero mga pribadong naka-save na chat ay hindi kasama sa ang sitemap, llms files, o AI content index.

entries.source: No. Public subject pages and guest mode entrypoints are indexable, but private saved chats are excluded from discovery files.
entries.value: Hindi. Pampubliko mga pahina ng paksa at guest mode entrypoints ay indexable, pero mga pribadong naka-save na chat ay excluded mula sa discovery files.

entries.source: No. The category structure helps search engines understand the library, but each page is meant to help a learner choose a guide, open the right mode, and keep studying actively.
entries.value: Hindi. Ang category structure tumutulong search engines understand ang aklatan, pero bawat pahina ay meant sa tulong isang mag-aaral pumili isang gabay, Buksan ang tama mode, at keep studying actively.

entries.source: No. The comparison links only to public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, and learning paths. Private saved conversations are not used as source content.
entries.value: Hindi. Ang paghahambing mga link lamang sa pampubliko guest-mode entrypoints, mga gabay, prompt libraries, at mga landas sa pag-aaral. Pribado saved conversations ay hindi ginamit bilang source content.

entries.source: No. The comparison pages are written to show when inspir is a better first click for live AI tutoring, prompts, and guest learning modes, and when a structured curriculum or official course library may still be useful.
entries.value: Hindi. Ang mga pahina ng paghahambing ay written sa show kapag ang inspir ay isang mas mahusay una click para sa live AI tutoring, mga prompt, at mga guest pag-aaral mode, at kapag isang structured curriculum o official aklatan ng kurso may pa rin maging kapaki-pakinabang.

entries.source: No. They link only to public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts, and learning paths. Private saved chats stay outside discovery surfaces.
entries.value: Hindi. Sila link lamang sa mga pampublikong pahina, mga pampublikong guest mode, mga gabay, mga prompt, at mga landas sa pag-aaral. Mga pribadong naka-save na chat stay outside discovery surfaces.

entries.source: No. Treat generated dialogue as a learning simulation. Cite real primary or secondary sources for factual claims.
entries.value: Hindi. Ituring ang generated dialogue bilang simulation sa pag-aaral. Sumipi ng tunay na primary o secondary source para sa factual claims.

entries.source: Not across every learning need. Khan Academy is useful for structured lessons and practice. inspir is useful when a learner needs live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, or a study workflow around the exact thing they are working on.
entries.value: Hindi across bawat pag-aaral kailangan. Khan Academy ay kapaki-pakinabang para sa structured lessons at pagsasanay. ang inspir ay kapaki-pakinabang kapag isang mag-aaral kailangan live AI tulong, Socratic mga tanong, mga hint, mga quiz, mga flashcard, feedback, o isang workflow sa pag-aaral sa paligid ng ang eksakto thing sila ay working sa.

entries.source: Not another answer box. A place to learn.
entries.value: Hindi isa pang kahon ng sagot. Isang lugar para matuto.

entries.source: Once the Cancellation Period is over, Tao will not refund the subscription fee even if you decide to cancel your subscription. For requesting a cancellation, you must contact Tao customer care or address an email to support@inspir.app. Once you opt to cancel your subscription, you will no longer have access to the subscription features.
entries.value: Kapag tapos na ang Cancellation Period, hindi ire-refund ng Tao ang subscription fee kahit magpasya kang kanselahin ang iyong subscription. Para humiling ng cancellation, dapat kang makipag-ugnayan sa Tao customer care o mag-email sa support@inspir.app. Kapag pinili mong kanselahin ang iyong subscription, mawawala na ang access mo sa subscription features.

entries.source: One AI learning system, several school jobs.
entries.value: Isa AI pag-aaral system, several paaralan mga gawain.

entries.source: One map for modes, prompts, paths, and guides.
entries.value: Isa mapa para sa mga mode, mga prompt, mga landas, at mga gabay.

entries.source: One mistake learners make is treating every card the same. If you know a card instantly, reviewing it again tomorrow may waste time. If you miss a card, waiting a week may be too long.
entries.value: Isa pagkakamali mga mag-aaral Gumawa ng ay treating bawat card ang same. Kung ikaw alam isang card instantly, pagrepaso ito again tomorrow may waste oras. Kung ikaw miss isang card, waiting isang week may maging too long.

entries.source: Open a mode and start immediately, with no account needed for the public guest experience.
entries.value: Magbukas ng mode at magsimula agad, nang hindi kailangan ng account para sa pampublikong guest experience.

entries.source: Open a public mode, test the student behavior, and inspect whether it asks, hints, quizzes, or critiques appropriately.
entries.value: Buksan isang pampubliko mode, Subukan ang estudyante behavior, at suriin kung ito nagtatanong, mga hint, mga quiz, o critiques appropriately.

entries.source: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: Magbukas ng nakabahaging workspace kasama ang isang AI collaborator. Gumawa ng draft na artifact, magpalitan ng mga edit, hamunin ang mga kahinaan, itala ang mga desisyon, at umalis nang may kongkretong progreso.

entries.value: Buksan Matutunan ang Anything, Humingi ng ang prerequisite mga ideya, pagkatapos switch tungo sa Socratic Instruction subukan iyong model.
